name: Video Generation
description: Generate videos using Gemini (Veo) with text prompts and optional reference images.

inputs.name: files
inputs.description: Reference images from upstream for video generation

outputs.name: response
outputs.description: Raw text response from the model

outputs.name: json
outputs.description: Any parsed JSON from the response

settings.label: Prompt
settings.placeholder: Describe the video you want to generate...
settings.description: The text prompt describing the video to generate.
